assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, an email address, and a personal phone number that can receive verification.
No Twilio account, project customization answers, or product channel choice exist yet.
No credit card is required to start a Twilio free trial.

developer_goal: Create a Twilio free trial account and complete the earliest official first-success path for one Twilio communications product.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved until one product quickstart is selected; candidate terminals differ by SMS, Voice, and Verify routes.
first_success.observable_signal: Product-specific: for Messaging with Virtual Phone, the expected SMS text is visible as a received message; Voice and Verify define different terminals.

route_selection.surface: Twilio Docs General Usage and product quickstarts after free-trial Console signup
route_selection.rule: Lexicographic selection only after peer product routes are resolved; do not invent a winner among equal consequential product choices.

candidates.name: Programmable Messaging / SMS quickstart with Virtual Phone
candidates.reason: General Usage presents Programmable SMS as one of three equal get-started product choices, not a labeled default.

candidates.name: Programmable Voice quickstart
candidates.reason: General Usage lists Voice as a peer of SMS and Verify rather than a universal first route.

candidates.name: Verify / 2FA quickstarts
candidates.reason: General Usage lists 2FA with Verify as a peer product choice with its own language and channel branches.

candidates.name: No-code SMS with Twilio Studio
candidates.reason: It is a Messaging-only no-code branch, not a cross-product default, and still presupposes choosing Messaging.

required_path.action: Start Twilio free-trial registration without a credit card.

required_fields.label: Trial signup form fields
required_fields.notes: Official docs list email verification, personal phone verification, and project customization, but the public try-twilio page is a JavaScript app whose exact field set was not readable without an authenticated walkthrough.

required_path.observable_result: Twilio begins the trial signup sequence.
The email address is verified for the trial account.
The personal phone number is verified for the trial account.

required_path.action: Customize the account with project information and complete signup.

required_fields.label: Project customization answers
required_fields.notes: Docs state project information is collected, but the exact current questions are not published as a fixed list.

required_path.observable_result: The developer arrives in the Twilio Console with trial credentials available.

required_path.action: Choose one product first-success route among Messaging, Voice, and Verify.

required_fields.label: Product / channel choice
required_fields.notes: General Usage tells new developers to choose the product they are most interested in.

required_path.observable_result: A single product quickstart becomes the measured path.

prerequisites.description: An email address and personal phone number that can complete Twilio trial verification.

external_gates.description: Email and personal phone verification are required before the trial Console is fully usable.

unavoidable_waits.description: Twilio must deliver email and phone verification challenges during signup.

platform_outcomes.description: Twilio creates a free trial account with product-specific free units and Console access after signup completes.

excluded.item: Reading Twilio documentation as a counted action
excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence for the path, not a product interaction.
Official free-trial docs state no credit card is required to start the trial.
Twilio documents that completing A2P 10DLC requires a paid account, after the trial boundary.

sources.title: General Usage
evidence_supported: Equal peer product choices: Programmable SMS, Programmable Voice, or 2FA with Verify

sources.title: Get started with your Twilio free trial account
evidence_supported: No credit card required for free trial
Console arrival and Virtual Phone SMS testing pointer

sources.title: Messaging Quickstart
evidence_supported: Messaging is one product quickstart family after account creation
Language-specific Messaging branches exist under the product choice

uncertainties.question: Which Twilio product and channel should define the corpus first-success path: Messaging, Voice, or Verify?
uncertainties.impact: Each product changes required resources, implementation steps, and the observable terminal, so action and field counts cannot be compared until one route is fixed.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A corpus-level product goal decision, or a vendor label that names one of SMS, Voice, or Verify as the default first route.

uncertainties.question: What exact current fields appear on Twilio free-trial registration and project-customization screens?
uncertainties.impact: Signup field counts remain unverified while the try-twilio UI stays opaque to unauthenticated HTML inspection.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough or screenshots of a fresh free-trial signup through Console arrival.
